introduction-title: VS Rails: How to use this mod:
introduction-text:
Rails
Minecarts move by rolling along rails, they are placed based on the direction the player is facing, if you cannot get the desired orientation right clicking with a wrench will cycle through all rail variants until the desired one is found.
MineCart
A minecart can be placed upon rails and drived by moving forward in the desired direction, an option to automatically move the cart is enabled by default with the hotkey 'R', minecarts can be picked up with a wrench by sneaking.

A mod by: FinnAliR
